_doc: Decluttr max published values per model id. Refreshed monthly by scripts/refresh-decluttr-comps.py via .github/workflows/refresh-comps.yml. Decluttr is our configured comp for LG laptops and a fallback for Windows laptops. Frontend reads this at runtime and falls back to COMP_SOURCES percentage if the model id isn't here. (LG phones were removed from the catalog 2026-05-12, so the values dict is empty until LG laptops or other categories are added.)
